description: A university rocketry team has installed a 120g electronics payload (GPS tracker + altimeter) in the aft section of their rocket at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/mass_audit_rocket.ork, but this payload was never accounted for in the OpenRocket design, compromising the stability margin. Diagnose the instability and restore a safe stability margin of at least 1.5 calibers by adding a mass component (nose weight/ballast) to the nose cone or upper body tube to counterbalance the aft payload. Do not delete the electronics payload. Verify the design with a simulation, save the modified file to the original path, and write a mass budget report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/mass_budget_report.txt documenting the stability issue, ballast mass and location, final stability margin, and simulation results including ground hit velocity and max altitude.
